name: autoloop
description: A standing development loop for Codex CLI, Claude Code, and opencode: labelled GitHub issues in, gated and independently reviewed PRs out.

interface.shortDescription: Issues in; reviewed, gated PRs out
interface.longDescription: Run a guarded GitHub issue-to-PR loop with independent planning and code reviews, objective gates, and human-controlled merging.
defaultPrompt: Set up autoloop in this repository.
